name: Scalr Terraform Automation API
what_it_does: Terraform automation and governance platform with REST API — providing remote state management, OPA policy enforcement, cost estimation, and multi-workspace Terraform workflows as a Terraform Cloud alternative with self-hosted or SaaS deployment options.
use_cases: Managing Terraform workspaces and remote state via API for infrastructure automation
Enforcing OPA policies on Terraform plans before apply via API integration
Triggering Terraform runs from CI/CD pipelines via REST API
Querying workspace run status and applying approved plans programmatically
Managing variable sets and environment configurations across workspaces via API
not_for: Non-Terraform IaC tools (Pulumi, CDK) — Scalr is Terraform-specific
Simple Terraform remote state without governance (use S3 + DynamoDB)
Teams happy with Terraform Cloud's feature set at current pricing
best_when: A platform team needs Terraform Cloud alternative with fine-grained RBAC, OPA policy enforcement, and self-hosted deployment option for compliance requirements.
avoid_when: You don't use Terraform, prefer Pulumi/CDK, or Terraform Cloud's features are sufficient for your governance needs.

auth.notes: API token from account settings. Bearer token auth. Account and environment hierarchy scoping. Service accounts for CI/CD. Scoped tokens for specific environments. RBAC-based token permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 5 workspaces, community features
pricing.notes: Free tier available. Workspace-based pricing. Belgian company. Self-hosted option for compliance. Terraform Cloud alternative positioning. Good OPA policy integration. SAML SSO on enterprise. 500+ organizations using Scalr.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for environments, workspaces, runs, state, variables, and policies. Bearer token auth with RBAC. Webhook for run events. Good documentation. Account/environment/workspace hierarchy similar to Terraform Cloud. OPA policy as code enforcement via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Run creation creates new runs — not idempotent. Workspace configuration idempotent by ID. State versions are append-only. Variable management idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Three-level hierarchy (account → environment → workspace) must be navigated
Runs are async — must poll for completion or use webhooks
OPA policy evaluation happens server-side — policy results available in run object
Self-hosted vs SaaS deployment has different API endpoint patterns

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Belgian company. EU/US data residency. RBAC-scoped tokens. Service accounts for CI/CD. Self-hosted option for maximum data control. OPA policy enforcement for Terraform governance.
